# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Datacenter Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: Path to developer-provided build script
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: Developer-provided deployment command
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  run-custom-commands:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run build script
        shell: bash
        run: |
          chmod +x "${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          "${{ inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Run deployment command
        shell: bash
        run: |
          eval "${{ inputs.deploy_command }}"
